mapper.select: SELECT id FROM gamedb.model_list WHERE model = #{model}
SELECT death_model_id FROM gamedb.model_list WHERE model = #{model}
SELECT width, height FROM gamedb.model_list WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT model FROM gamedb.model_list WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gamedb.model_list (model, width, height, death_model_id) VALUES (#{model}, #{width}, #{height}, #{deathModelId})
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM gamedb.model_list ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
